text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Lately, I've been playing with this little girl while
she waits for her mom to finish work.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
She wants to play tag today, but it's not very fun
with just two players, sooo...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to join us? Only if you want to, of
course! Whaddya say?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'm used to looking after my little sisters,
but even I'm not good enough to pull off tag with
only two players...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but don't feel obligated to go all-out with us
or anything! I know you're probably tired from
work and all.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Phew, great work! Who knew playing tag at such
a leisurely pace would be so fun!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I conserved a lot of energy by casually jogging
most of the time, so it was super easy to sprint at
my target at the very last moment!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yup, yup! Y'know what? I think that ended up
being great training! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Great job! Honestly... I wasn't expecting you to
play tag with as much enthusiasm as the kid...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But I was impressed! You were so cool!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Even I got caught up in you guys' energy and got
all worked up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm exhausted from the game of tag, but seeing
Ines Fujin run up close was a very educational
experience.
